title: Bridge Essay: Mindfulness in the focus of the neurosciences - The contribution of neuroimaging to the understanding of mindfulness.
concept: Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, depersonalization, nondual awareness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, depersonalization, nondual awareness.

**Mindfulness in the focus of the neurosciences - The contribution of neuroimaging to the understanding of mindfulness.** - Front Behav Neurosci (2022). DOI: 10.3389/fnbeh.2022.928522. PMID: 36325155. BACKGROUND: Mindfulness affects human levels of experience by facilitating the immediate and impartial perception of phenomena, including sensory stimulation, emotions, and thoughts. Mindfulness is now a focus of neuroimaging, since technical and methodological developments in magnetic resonance imaging have made it possible to observe subjects performing mindfulness tasks.
